## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / Enhancement
- [ ] Gameplay change
- [ ] New expansion
- [ ] Refactor / Technical debt
- [ ] Documentation / README

## Checklist

<!--
For gameplay changes or new expansions, the README and screenshots MUST be
updated to reflect the new state of the game.
-->

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] Build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm run test:unit`)
- [ ] E2E tests pass (`npm run test:e2e`)
- [ ] README is updated (required for gameplay changes and new expansions)
- [ ] Screenshots are updated (required for gameplay changes and new expansions)
- [ ] No new console errors on the deployed site
